description: Named milestone years at which v6 extracts conditional marginal distributions from the nested-MC table. Each year is reported as a histogram + violin in the Benchmark-Year Distributions dashboard view and as a p05/p25/p50/p75/p95 row in the validation CSV.

years.label: Near-term (6 years out)
years.notes: Within quantitative regime; fleet response to announced policy.

years.label: Post-neutrality maturity
years.notes: Scenario-envelope territory; report as conditional marginal.

years.label: CAV/STI target-reach year
years.notes: Target-reach definition from footprint_model (linear ramp to 2075).
